---
title: "Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words"
---

# Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words

Range: `1291-1350`.

## Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 10    |
| stub     | 50    |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                      | Completion | Summary                                                                       |
| ----- | ----------------------------------------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1291  | [accessibility](#rune-1291)               | authored   | Make the system usable by people with varied bodies, senses, and tools.       |
| 1292  | `STUB` [adaptive layout](#rune-1292)      | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1293  | [affordance](#rune-1293)                  | authored   | A cue that suggests what action is possible here.                             |
| 1294  | `STUB` [animation](#rune-1294)            | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1295  | `STUB` [app shell](#rune-1295)            | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1296  | `STUB` [breadcrumb](#rune-1296)           | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1297  | `STUB` [call to action](#rune-1297)       | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1298  | `STUB` [click target](#rune-1298)         | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1299  | `STUB` [component {UX}](#rune-1299)       | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1300  | `STUB` [confirmation](#rune-1300)         | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1301  | `STUB` [copy](#rune-1301)                 | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1302  | `STUB` [dark mode](#rune-1302)            | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1303  | [discoverability](#rune-1303)             | authored   | How easily a user can find what the system can do.                            |
| 1304  | `STUB` [empty state](#rune-1304)          | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1305  | `STUB` [error state](#rune-1305)          | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1306  | [feedback](#rune-1306)                    | authored   | The system speaking back after the user acts.                                 |
| 1307  | `STUB` [focus state](#rune-1307)          | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1308  | [form validation](#rune-1308)             | authored   | Validation at the form boundary so bad input is caught legibly.               |
| 1309  | `STUB` [gesture](#rune-1309)              | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1310  | `STUB` [grid](#rune-1310)                 | stub       | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from. |
| 1311  | `STUB` [hierarchy {UX}](#rune-1311)       | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1312  | `STUB` [hover state](#rune-1312)          | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1313  | `STUB` [hydration](#rune-1313)            | stub       | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from. |
| 1314  | `STUB` [input field](#rune-1314)          | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1315  | `STUB` [interaction](#rune-1315)          | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1316  | `STUB` [internationalization](#rune-1316) | stub       | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from. |
| 1317  | [keyboard navigation](#rune-1317)         | authored   | Make the interface fully operable without a mouse.                            |
| 1318  | `STUB` [label {UX}](#rune-1318)           | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1319  | `STUB` [layout {UX}](#rune-1319)          | stub       | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from. |
| 1320  | `STUB` [localization](#rune-1320)         | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1321  | `STUB` [menu](#rune-1321)                 | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1322  | `STUB` [microcopy](#rune-1322)            | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1323  | `STUB` [modal](#rune-1323)                | stub       | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.               |
| 1324  | `STUB` [navigation](#rune-1324)           | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1325  | `STUB` [offline-first {UX}](#rune-1325)   | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1326  | `STUB` [onboarding](#rune-1326)           | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1327  | `STUB` [output view](#rune-1327)          | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1328  | `STUB` [pagination control](#rune-1328)   | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1329  | `STUB` [panel](#rune-1329)                | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1330  | `STUB` [placeholder](#rune-1330)          | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1331  | [progressive disclosure](#rune-1331)      | authored   | Reveal complexity in stages rather than all at once.                          |
| 1332  | `STUB` [prompt surface {UX}](#rune-1332)  | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1333  | [responsive design](#rune-1333)           | authored   | Layout that adapts gracefully to device or viewport size.                     |
| 1334  | `STUB` [screen](#rune-1334)               | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1335  | `STUB` [scroll state](#rune-1335)         | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1336  | `STUB` [search box](#rune-1336)           | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1337  | `STUB` [selection](#rune-1337)            | stub       | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from. |
| 1338  | `STUB` [skeleton state](#rune-1338)       | stub       | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from. |
| 1339  | `STUB` [state transition](#rune-1339)     | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1340  | `STUB` [stepper](#rune-1340)              | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1341  | `STUB` [sync state](#rune-1341)           | stub       | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from. |
| 1342  | `STUB` [table view](#rune-1342)           | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1343  | `STUB` [theme](#rune-1343)                | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1344  | `STUB` [tooltip](#rune-1344)              | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1345  | `STUB` [typography](#rune-1345)           | stub       | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.    |
| 1346  | [user flow](#rune-1346)                   | authored   | The path a user walks through the product to finish a task.                   |
| 1347  | `STUB` [validation message](#rune-1347)   | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1348  | `STUB` [view model](#rune-1348)           | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1349  | `STUB` [viewport](#rune-1349)             | stub       | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.         |
| 1350  | [visual hierarchy](#rune-1350)            | authored   | Arrange attention so the right thing is seen first.                           |

## Entries

### [1291] accessibility {#rune-1291}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Make the system usable by people with varied bodies, senses, and tools.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** Make the system usable by people with varied bodies, senses, and tools.

### [1292] adaptive layout {#rune-1292}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1293] affordance {#rune-1293}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A cue that suggests what action is possible here.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** A cue that suggests what action is possible here.

### [1294] animation {#rune-1294}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1295] app shell {#rune-1295}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1296] breadcrumb {#rune-1296}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1297] call to action {#rune-1297}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1298] click target {#rune-1298}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1299] component {UX} {#rune-1299}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1300] confirmation {#rune-1300}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1301] copy {#rune-1301}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1302] dark mode {#rune-1302}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1303] discoverability {#rune-1303}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** How easily a user can find what the system can do.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** How easily a user can find what the system can do.

### [1304] empty state {#rune-1304}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1305] error state {#rune-1305}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1306] feedback {#rune-1306}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The system speaking back after the user acts.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** The system speaking back after the user acts.

### [1307] focus state {#rune-1307}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1308] form validation {#rune-1308}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Validation at the form boundary so bad input is caught legibly.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** Validation at the form boundary so bad input is caught legibly.

### [1309] gesture {#rune-1309}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1310] grid {#rune-1310}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1311] hierarchy {UX} {#rune-1311}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1312] hover state {#rune-1312}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1313] hydration {#rune-1313}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1314] input field {#rune-1314}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1315] interaction {#rune-1315}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1316] internationalization {#rune-1316}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1317] keyboard navigation {#rune-1317}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Make the interface fully operable without a mouse.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** Make the interface fully operable without a mouse.

### [1318] label {UX} {#rune-1318}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1319] layout {UX} {#rune-1319}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1320] localization {#rune-1320}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1321] menu {#rune-1321}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1322] microcopy {#rune-1322}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1323] modal {#rune-1323}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1324] navigation {#rune-1324}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1325] offline-first {UX} {#rune-1325}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1326] onboarding {#rune-1326}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1327] output view {#rune-1327}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1328] pagination control {#rune-1328}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1329] panel {#rune-1329}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1330] placeholder {#rune-1330}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1331] progressive disclosure {#rune-1331}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Reveal complexity in stages rather than all at once.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** Reveal complexity in stages rather than all at once.

### [1332] prompt surface {UX} {#rune-1332}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1333] responsive design {#rune-1333}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Layout that adapts gracefully to device or viewport size.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** Layout that adapts gracefully to device or viewport size.

### [1334] screen {#rune-1334}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1335] scroll state {#rune-1335}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1336] search box {#rune-1336}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1337] selection {#rune-1337}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1338] skeleton state {#rune-1338}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1339] state transition {#rune-1339}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1340] stepper {#rune-1340}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1341] sync state {#rune-1341}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1342] table view {#rune-1342}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1343] theme {#rune-1343}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1344] tooltip {#rune-1344}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1345] typography {#rune-1345}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1346] user flow {#rune-1346}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The path a user walks through the product to finish a task.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** The path a user walks through the product to finish a task.

### [1347] validation message {#rune-1347}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1348] view model {#rune-1348}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1349] viewport {#rune-1349}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

### [1350] visual hierarchy {#rune-1350}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Arrange attention so the right thing is seen first.

**Shadow:** the human-facing surface can make the wrong action easier than the safe one.

**Pocket gloss:** Arrange attention so the right thing is seen first.
